subtitle: Week starts with handovers and key system updates
context: James Salas Guillen is returning from leave today after handing over H&S work. Multiple colleagues (Marie Cooksey, Michael O'Sullivan) are absent. Several systems issues (GitHub dashboard failures, Access support cases) require attention, and IM Principles URL changes need finalizing by 23-24 June.
